projects.title: Lavore Branding
projects.description: Complete brand identity for Lavore logo, brand mark, color guide, typography guide, and final mockups. Built to feel elevated yet approachable across all touchpoints.

projects.title: ArchiCoat
projects.description: Logo design and social media content for ArchiCoat, an interior design brand. The concept draws from architectural arches, balancing precision with warmth.

projects.title: Ramadan Campaigns
projects.description: Ramadan Kareem posts designed for multiple clients tailored to each brand voice while sharing seasonal warmth.

projects.title: QAM Marketing Agency
projects.description: Social media content and bold graphic posts for QAM featuring punchy messaging like "Your Brand Called. It wants a Glow Up."

projects.title: Morocco: Revealing the Culture
projects.description: Six art-boards depicting Moroccan characters, buildings, and patterns using only basic shapes divided into puzzle cube faces that physically reveal the culture.

projects.title: 3D Bilingual Font
projects.description: A handcrafted English + Arabic typeface built from physical materials wire, clay, white glue, honey, and shampoo. Each letter constructed, photographed, and refined.

projects.title: Kufic Composition
projects.description: Typography project creating Kufic script compositions, culminating in a final paper-woven output where letterforms become structural textile elements.

projects.title: Typographical Expansion Poster
projects.description: A bilingual poster around the word "expansion / توسع" exploring how the concept can be enacted through the physical tension of letterforms in space.

projects.title: Movie Poster Series
projects.description: Two movie posters from one object a seashell from Gouna. "The Deadly Seashell" (horror) vs "The Story of the Seashell" (vibrant) — how concept transforms meaning.

projects.title: Concept: Book
projects.description: A board game and puzzle concept based on "The Curious Incident of the Dog in the Night-time" translating themes of logic and mystery into interactive physical play.

projects.title: Elia | Olive Oil Branding
projects.description: Brand illustrations for Elia olive oil, telling the production journey from grove to bottle through warm, handcrafted visuals.

projects.title: The Power of Triangles
projects.description: Oranges drawn entirely from triangles on a deep blue background exploring how organic form can emerge from the simplest geometric constraint.

projects.title: The Switch
projects.description: A geometric poster about life before and after university ordered blocks transform into scattered chaos before reaching a peak, visualizing personal growth.

projects.title: Food Around the World
projects.description: A personal illustrated poster series celebrating global cuisine Sushi, Croissant, Italian Pizza, and Belgian Waffle through bold flat graphic design.

projects.title: To Have Loved and Lost
projects.description: A bilingual English/Arabic poster in red and black minimal and emotional, exploring love and loss with restraint.

projects.title: Print Guide / Aywa Ba2a
projects.description: A community resource for Cairo creatives mapping print locations, printing dos and don’ts, and practical advice for students and independent designers.

projects.title: Rowad | RME Modern Engineering
projects.description: Designed the full company profile, banners, case studies, and social media templates for RME Modern Engineering a professional engineering company built around the tagline "Building Realities."
